name: Cory Reed
background: Cory J. Reed is President, Production & Precision Ag. He is responsible for the company's global production and precision agriculture business. Reed joined John Deere in 1998 and has held various leadership roles in marketing and sales.

company_affiliations.name: Deere & Company
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President, Worldwide Agriculture & Turf Division (Production and Precision Ag)
